mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway_auth(gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{gatewayId}, #{apiKey}, #{rateLimit}, #{expireTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway_auth SET api_key = #{apiKey}, rate_limit = #{rateLimit}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_auth ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
